arts.sum: Jude Bellingham is suspended for Real Madrid's next Champions League game after picking up a yellow card against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: When Will Lauren Hemp Return for Manchester City?
arts.sum: Lauren Hemp has been missing in action since undergoing knee surgery last November.

arts.ttl: Why Erling Haaland Isn't Playing vs. Real Madrid in the Champions League
arts.sum: Erling Haaland was named to the bench in the second leg of their Champions League playoff clash with Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Man City hit by ANOTHER injury blow just days before Liverpool showdown as star man is forced off the pitch in opening stages of Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: The star man's substitution came just four minutes after Kylian Mbappe opened the lead with a chip goal above Ederson in the fourth minute on Tuesday.

Erling Haaland was named on the bench by Pep Guardiola, a major blow for City as they look to make history. Guardiola had suggested that Haaland was in line to start but his progress looks to have been slower than hoped.

arts.ttl: Man Utd flop Antony to rival Kylian Mbappe for La Liga award after stunning revival for £86m man
arts.sum: The Brazilian is loving life in Spain after a miserable stint in English football

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Real Madrid-Man City, PSV-Juve
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Wednesday's Champions League action as Real Madrid take on Man City, PSV take on Juventus and Paris Saint-Germain take on Brest.
